'''sawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ziggety|ziggety]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ziggety|ziggety]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sawate|sawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sawatesher|sawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawatesherĂ«m|sawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sawatero|sawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sawateshĂ«|sawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawateshĂ«m|sawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisawatero|gokisawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisawateshĂ«|gokisawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawateshĂ«m|gokisawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosawankerom|gosawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosawankeshĂ«|gosawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawankeshĂ«m|gosawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosawankeya|gosawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sawaterom|sawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawatemu|sawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sawateya|sawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisawaterom|gokisawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawatemu|gokisawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisawateya|gokisawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sawawate|sawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sawawatesher|sawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawawatesherĂ«m|sawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sawawatero|sawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sawawateshĂ«|sawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawawateshĂ«m|sawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisawawatero|gokisawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisawawateshĂ«|gokisawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawawateshĂ«m|gokisawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosawawankerom|gosawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosawawankeshĂ«|gosawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawawankeshĂ«m|gosawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosawawankeya|gosawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sawawaterom|sawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawawatemu|sawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sawawateya|sawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisawawaterom|gokisawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawawatemu|gokisawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisawawateya|gokisawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠte|sĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠtesher|sĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠtero|sĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠtero|gokisĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠterom|sĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠtemu|sĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠteya|sĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠterom|gokisĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠwĂŠteya|gokisĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safwafte|safwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safwaftesher|safwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safwaftesherĂ«m|safwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safwaftero|safwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safwafteshĂ«|safwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safwafteshĂ«m|safwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafwaftero|gokisafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafwafteshĂ«|gokisafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafwafteshĂ«m|gokisafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafwafnkerom|gosafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafwafnkeshĂ«|gosafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafwafnkeshĂ«m|gosafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafwafnkeya|gosafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safwafterom|safwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safwaftemu|safwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safwafteya|safwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafwafterom|gokisafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafwaftemu|gokisafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafwafteya|gokisafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
